Product Description: Fruit of the Earth Aloe Vera Juice 32 oz. is made with organically grown aloe. Full strength 99.8% aloe from 100% inner gel fillet. Helps encourage muscle and joint functions and maintains oral care. No sugars, starches or thickeners. A full strength vegetable juice. Taste & Color: You may notice a difference in the taste between Fruit of the Earth Full Strength Aloe Vera and other brands. 99.8% pure aloe vera has a distinctive taste which may not be present in products of lesser purity regardless of label claims. Important: Fruit of the Earth Aloe Vera Juice may darken slightly in color due to seasonal variations. Tiny particles of aloe vera may settle after standing. Simply shake bottle to disperse. Both darkening and settling are normal and in no way affect purity and efficacy. The aloe in this product is certified organic by the Texas Department of Agriculture. Made in the USA.
